products.summary: What's included? You will receive a tutorial on how each stores anti-fraud system works, and how to get around it so you can successfully pl…
products.description:
**What's included?**

You will receive a tutorial on how each stores anti-fraud system works, and how to get around it so you can successfully place an order with them so it doesn't get canceled. 

Even if you are not banned stores are vigilantly aware of refunders, and have very advanced algorithms to detect chance of fraud when placing an order. This Is called a fraud score. 

When it reaches a certain score, your order will keep getting canceled, and every future you try placing will get canceled as well no matter what you try. 

With it, you can work your way around it, so you can keep r@ping these stores to the max!

____________________________________________________

#### The Secret Step-By-Step Guide Companies Do Not Want You To Read That Is Going To Get You Back On Fresh in just hours! 

**Inside our 'Evasion Book'  You'll Discover How to Create  Stealth Accounts (Step-by-Step):**
 
**Get Back On Today**
![image](https://www.auctionstealth.com/lp/images-lp/icons/cart.png)
**No more sleepless nights worrying if you have been suspended. No more worrying about looking for new stores. Get back on within a few days with our help.**

**Newbie Friendly**
![image](https://www.auctionstealth.com/lp/images-lp/icons/bubble.png)
It’s an easy-to-follow step-by-step guide anyone can follow no matter their skill level. 

**Works With EVERY Country**
![image](https://www.auctionstealth.com/lp/images-lp/icons/world.png)
It doesn’t matter where you are in the world, our guides will work for you. You could be in one country but operate accounts from anywhere else in the world. Especially using our private residential drop service where you can ship your orders 



**Sell/Refund with Multiple Accounts Safely**
![image](https://c51786c25e8899440e95-a743f1b96ea079aed4cacf6de5ac10d9.ssl.cf2.rackcdn.com/33887.png)
Learn how to create multiple accounts the right way, without linking or requiring constant verification. Nowadays, companies are vigilantly aware of refunders and invest hundreds of thousands if not millions to do everything in their power to stop multi-accounting and link you back in ways you would never even imagine, such as via email IP web crawlers that catch you off guard and link you back getting you banned! Even if you currently are currently using a stealth setup, and do not believe that anonymity is an issue, we can assure you that we can point out MULTIPLE flaws in your strategy !

**Stealth Refreshed & Updated!**
Things change and with that you NEED updated information. We work tirelessly to keep our methods fresh and ALWAYS up to date

products.title: Evasion Book - Level 2
products.summary: Have you exhausted all the possible stores you can hit, or are you focusing on one specific store that keeps canceling your orders?
products.description:
Have you exhausted all the possible stores you can hit, or are you focusing on one specific store that keeps canceling your orders? May it be Walmart, Amazon, Target, Apple... or perhaps you're a reseller using botting software looking to buy in bulk for hype items when the next drop comes out but your orders just keep getting canceled!?

Not Anymore. We’ll Help You Change All That.

Starting Today, Your Ban Problems Are Gone!
![image](https://rendia.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/cybersecurity.png)
Dear User,
We know what it feels like to receive that horrible email stating your order has been canceled or your account has been locked due to being traced back to your other accounts, or may it be Amazon hits you with AVS & that annoying procedure asking you to verify your billing statement, payment info, address, and so on. We know the frustrations of your orders or accounts being put on hold and weeks of back and forth research on what to do which goes nowhere.

![image](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcR5CgeaRr64mz66Ww9Do2DLzXV8Wxg0Unx6dYWNNWXHQrVdKHUzOU7EKmw3orefzORNIfE&usqp=CAU)
We've been there and done it all. We are now here to show you how to take things to the next level, so you can quickly and easily get back on.

You will learn how to overcome anything these companies EVER throw at you. You will learn how to create multiple accounts while keeping your real name, address, phone number, and credit card number totally secure in a total legal way!

#### If Your Account Is Blocked Or Your Orders Keep                                                                   Getting Canceled & You Don't What To Do,                                       Then You NEED To Read On.            
Our level 2 Evade Book, outlines all the steps you need to go from absolutely nothing to a full Pro! 

But we know (and will show you) every secret and workaround there is to create new full anonymous unlinkable accounts! 

So what Is the difference between Evade Book Level 1 and Level 2?
![image](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcRV2pxU0c24iyIGmTAsav_5J9dBt2wCMHq19tlgGMtgqr6RLR43qkgljALkU5DPTjVQSzQ&usqp=CAU)
Evade Book - Level 2 is a complete 100% guaranteed-to-work no bull guide to creating totally new unlinkable fully anonymous accounts while teaching the most up-to-date reasons why order cancelations occur and how each stores anti-fraud/anti-botting algorithms work. This is also perfect for stores that limit the number of times you can purchase a select item, such as Xbox, PS5, Apple items, and more!

What does this mean? It means that after reading Evade Book - Level 2 you WILL be capable of creating not one, not two, but as many new accounts as you need and keep hitting while never being detected to your previous accounts using our in-depth methods.

If you are looking at Amazon, it works for ALL Amazon Marketplaces including US, UK, Canada, etc!

It doesn’t matter what happened to your previous account; be it suspended, blocked, banned, blacklisted, or anything else, you WILL learn how to crank out new accounts. Not only that, but this also covers the most advanced techniques and tools to push your orders through on multiple accounts at once and to NOT face order cancelations, as well as the BEST and most up to date ways to refund stores!

Of course, anyone can show you how to make thousands of accounts, but what good are they if you get blocked again and again.
![image](https://img.freepik.com/premium-vector/designers-agency-flat-design-concept-illustration-people-characters_9209-5399.jpg?size=626&ext=jpg&ga=GA1.1.2082370165.1716422400&semt=ais_user)
We outline exact step-by-step methods to take in order to keep your new anonymous accounts safe and secure, avoid getting your account closed, getting failed refunds, order cancelations, accounts put on hold asking to verify information/documents and more!

We show you how to stay under the radar, how to pass account reviews, and so on.


What else is included?

- Lifetime Updates.
- OVER 48 pages of PURE quality and canon material! NO Fillers and straight to the point! 
- Learn to be Fully Anonymous You will learn how to cloak your online presence, not only for stores but this can be used anywhere else you might go online.
- Verify Your Account I will show you how to verify your (for example: Amazon accounts) the right way without compromising your identity!
- Suppliers and Wholesalers Get access to the suppliers and wholesalers that are proven to work if you're an Amazon/eBay Seller to unlock your account!
- Sell Without Getting Suspended Learn how to sell whatever you want while minimizing your chances of having those items removed or your accounts suspended. 
- For example: It's a known fact that companies like PayPal ban new users when they start to receive many payments as G&S, or eBay restricting accounts when you reach a certain selling limit. 
Prevent Account Linking We show you how to easily prevent your accounts from ever being linked again!
And Much More!



Following this book, you will never again be left empty-handed worrying and keep refreshing the page, wondering if your order went through or not.

You will always be one step ahead.

products.description:
#### Private Mentorship Program. | All the Knowledge, Success, & Methods Gathered from the top-tier refunders for you to replicate.

✒️This mentorship covers all the fundamentals of refunding and social engineering.
 it includes all the knowledge and most up-to-date methods that top-tier refunders use and covers literally EVERYTHING there is to refunding OR social engineering. 
 Not the BS methods like boxing, DNA, FTID!

 We provide the top tier methods:

-  what to do in case of investigations by companies
- protect your payment system and identity
- bypass police reports
- proof of destruction
- Claim DNA even if photo and signature / one time passcode delivery
- fix failed refunds
-  find private stores to hit
- repeatedly refund the same stores and much much more.

 It's all a very very detailed explanation, and we can guarantee you that you'll be making ATLEAST $2,000/week within 2 weeks of starting if you follow everything correctly.
 You also get access to a community where students discuss strategies to go even more beyond with these methods.
 We also include -

📖 How to Sell your Refunded Goods OVERSEAS for over 145%+ Its MSRP rather than 80%. Become your own Apple Buyer.

📖 Refund the best stores on repeat. Monopolize accounts, and build empires with 5 accounts at once per store and refund simultaneously on them. 
Don't wish to refund under your name? Can't Refund USA stores because you're not from the USA? Want to refund European stores from the USA?

☑️ All of those concerns are covered!

📖 Methods, Waves, SEs, OPSEC Setup, & More. This is just the tip of the iceberg.

**--PLEASE NOTE: THE PRICE IS FOR EITHER REFUND OR SE MENTORSHIP. FOR SUBSEQUENT PLANS DISCOUNTS ARE AVAILABLE.--**

PLEASE LOOK INTO OUR REFUND MENTORSHIP LEVEL 2 IF YOU ARE INTERESTED NOT ONLY IN LEARNING GENERAL FUNDAMENTALS AND LEARNING HOW TO TAKE UP SPECIFIC SCENARIOS ON YOUR OWN BUT WISH TO OBTAIN SPECIFIC METHODS FOR EACH STORE, MORE ADVANCED TECHNIQUES AND APPROACHES, THEN REFUND MENTORSHIP LEVEL 2 IS FOR YOU!

Please read Mentorship Level 1 first, before reading this.

This mentorship concludes the first part of the mentorship and provides all necessary fundamentals for most specific stores and more specific methods to go over with proven and tested stores that they have been applied to already, whereas the first part of the mentorship basically prepares you to be able to handle specific scenarios and deal with situations where in case of methods go wrong or give troubles which is pretty often.

products.title: Selling Platforms Payout

products.description:
Get paid by your favorite selling marketplace, while doing practically nothing! We take care of all of the work for you! 

** What you need to be eligible to start earning - **

- A valid account able to sell on ONE of the following platforms: eBay, Mercari, OfferUP, GOAT, StockX, Alias, or Poshmark. 
- Must be reputable on forums or be an existing customer 

How it works? 
1. Get in touch with us, and we will tell you an item to list for sale 
2. Once the item sells, send us the shipping label and we will take care of the sale and customer. 
3. Once the platform pays you, you keep 35% of the payout and send us the remaining amount. 

Simple as that. 
We will provide you full listing information to post, then you inform us once the listing was sold and we handle the rest up until payout. 

Great sucess rate. In case if failure you lose absolutely nothing.
Message @refundgod on telegram to get started

products.title: Stealth / OPsec Guide + Rebill Bypass Guide
products.summary: Refunding can be risky, getting you into all sorts of troubles if done incorrectly or simply because a huge rebill wave is currently going o…
products.description:
Refunding can be risky, getting you into all sorts of troubles if done incorrectly or simply because a huge rebill wave is currently going on, like the time with Walmart when the instant script got patched or the time with Costco when they launched a huge rebill wave. Canceling your card or blocking merchants does not help in these cases, as merchants can offline charge your card. Banks have a feature called VAU for cards, which unfortunately makes it near impossible to escape from a rebill. Luckily there are ways around it, and i also include how to be 100% private and anonymous creating absolutely 0 links to your real identity even without changing payment or address.

BE SMART AND DONT BE ONE OF THESE PEOPLE BELOW:
![image](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/2tr77C8PdqFH.png?o=1)
![image](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/cbYbI147T0QX.png?o=1)
![image](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/JtcnjWg85nAL.png?o=1)
![image](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/nPcxhKVjZ6i8.png?o=1)
![image](https://gcdnb.pbrd.co/images/Sfl6Chh7aVs8.png?o=1)

### HAVE YOU BEEN ALREADY REBILLED? IF SO KEEP READING, BUT IF NOT NO NEED!

**Addressing Rebills At The Source from a Consumer perspective**

Rebill protection for refunders is a big necessity as stores are vigilantly aware of refunders and are investing hundreds of thousands every month into fighting against us, and finding solutions to put an end to their loss. This is why, they prevent their loss, and once determined your order has participated in such a service, they rebill your refund whether due to a poor job by the service or due to the store catching on to the mass pattern. 

While closing your Credit Card is helpful in the short term that usually doesn't address the cause of rebills. Until you invest in a solution that addresses the root cause, you'll be stuck fighting the same battle over and over. 

Your best chance of success is to analyze past data of the store to determine the possibility and risk of a rebill and only then fight the real problem. Only then can you revise your refunds to get rid of the causes and launch targeted solutions and rebill protection methods. 

Our rebill management strategies help you fight these processes, freeing you to handle the core refunds functions you excel at. With our solutions, we’ll save you time , stress and manpower you’d normally need to fight and prevent rebills.

![image](https://telegra.ph/file/a7684852492d847a596ff.jpg)

#### Learn to prevent rebills and fight existing rebills!

Already been rebilled and have no choice but to fight it with a chargeback? 

Before rushing in panic and filing a dispute with your financial institution, be aware that these merchants have very advanced ways of fighting disputes, especially ones associated with refunders. No matter what your situation is, if you do not know what you are doing, the bank will always side with a trusted and large merchant with set strict policies, instead of a small customer who may be demanding a resolution outside of policy. 

When you fight a chargeback, you are asking the bank to take money away from the merchant. That’s a really big deal — especially if it is a substantial amount of money! So in order to be successful, you need to present the most compelling and convincing case possible. 

**Want Help Creating Compelling Evidence Packages That Actually Win?**

Creating a compelling case is usually the most time-consuming part of fighting chargebacks. But it is also the most important.
